chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.3177 of 2025 (Taufiq vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 15.12.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz Tunio, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohari, DPG O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in a case bearing Crime No.124/2025, u/s 9(i)3(b) SCNSA, registered at Police Station Memon Goth, Karachi by means of this application. 2. Applicant was arrested on 23.05.2025 by a police team headed by SIP Ahsan Ali of Police Station Memon Goth, from Katcha Rod, Near Haider Ali shah Dargah, Murad Memon Goth, Malir Karachi, and from him allegedly 520 grams of charas was recovered. Hence, he was booked in the present case. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that applicant is first offender; the investigation is complete as the challan has been submitted, and he is no more required for further investigation. Moreover, the alleged offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause u/s 497 Cr. PC 4. Learned DPG has opposed bail but has confirmed that applicant is the first offender. More so, the alleged offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497, Cr.P.C. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/ (Rupees fifty thousand only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to be executed to the satisfaction of the trial Court. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.
Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
